race.comment: FASVARA (10) returned in fine fashion with a strong victory around this circuit and winning rider Cormack sticks in the saddle. Looks the runner in this field with the most upside and should be going very close again. SUM INVICTUS (9) has been right there in recent efforts and must be respected out of the Goldman yard. Bold showing expected. The well-related YENDY (5) (half to 2xG3 winner and 2xG2 placed Chica Fuerte) goes well for hoop Newman who has a win and two placings from just four steers. Again gets the benefit of his 2kg claim and has to be included. BLACK MINTO (4) doesn't know how to run a bad race and is a must for the exotics players. FAIRWAY CHOICE (6) best of the rest.
